title: centaurea carduiformis subsp. iranica
intro: Centaurea carduiformis subsp. iranica, also known as Iranian knapweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the mountainous regions of Iran and neighboring countries. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Centaurea carduiformis subsp. iranica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
